proofClaims: ZIP extraction self-test is required before branch creation or file application.
The overlay manifest must be found under repo/.overlay before git branch mutation.
Branch-exists handling must switch to and reuse a clean branch instead of failing.
Only one active command may run at a time.
Sequential/batch queue execution must stop on BLOCKED and require CLOSED_CLEANLY before starting the next phase.
A blocked handoff must produce a continuation packet that can be pasted or uploaded to ChatGPT for clean closeout.
Fresh commands cannot be completed by stale handoffs; matching requires commandId, expectedZipFilename, runNonce, and phaseSlug.
Phone autopilot is allowed only as guarded single-phase or stop-on-block sequential batch until additional unattended proof exists.

continuationModel.nextConversationAction: Upload or paste the blocked handoff into ChatGPT.
